reviews.comment:
Precios acorde. Atención mala, no por el personal, sino por falta de personal y tener que esperar tanto. Le faltan surtidores.

(Translated by Google)
Prices are reasonable. Service is poor, not because of the staff, but because of understaffing and the long wait times. They're short on fuel pumps.
